title: Chaos Erupts from the Capital to Udon
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kinemon, Zoro, Unknown person #10, Ashura Doji, Unknown person #11 as Yasuie’s execution exposes Wano’s cruelty as chaos spreads from the Flower Capital to Udon prison.
scene: The capital erupts after Yasuie’s death while Big Mom’s arrival throws Udon prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You protect her?!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: So you are Allies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They're chasing you, dummy!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ZOROJURO! I'm SO SORRY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I thought my face was covered!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mosshead knows that babe?! That bastard... His bounty's lower than mine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Kuri Bakura Town Outshirts

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So ya tried to topple us to bring us into yer fold?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: URGH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You lot burned down head mountain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Kine- Mon!

dialogue.speaker: Ashura Doji
dialogue.text: Wait, Ashura! We admit our fault!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, we do. We should have prostrated ourselves before you and begged atthe very start.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We didn't even stop to think how 20 years of days and nights might change a man's mind...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were so proud of our great cause of "a Lord's honor"... we stooped to forceful methods in our haste!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: GFFH!

dialogue.speaker: Ashura Doji
dialogue.text: Forgive us, Ashura!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Our plan yet lives!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Yasuieie gave his life to pull wool over the eyes of our enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and the captured samurai, at the very least,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: know that the moon tattoo they bear on their ankles is no mere fad!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we manage to free the Samurai in the capital, they'll surely lend us their strength, too!

dialogue.speaker: Ashura Doji
dialogue.text: Will you fight at our side, Ashura?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Come with me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: There's somethin' I gotta show you lot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The front gates have been destroyed!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the second and third gates, too! She's through!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Is that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've seen her before, but there's no way...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There isn't, but there's only one granny that can destroy steel gates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yeah...that really is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: BI...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Big Mom!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: What's a big mom? Is it tasty?

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Why the hell is big mom hereeeeeee?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I was told they sunk her ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Whaaa AAA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Is this a night- mare?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Uwwwwwaa eggghhh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Another Emperor of the sea! At the same level as Master Kaido! Why is she here?!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Yasuie’s Execution and Udon Chaos storyline with 40 dialogue beats. Yasuie’s sacrifice and Big Mom’s arrival turn Wano’s hidden resistance into open chaos.
